The medications prescribed include several agents that are commonly used in cardiovascular and renal management (e.g., Labetalol, NIFEdipine CR, Warfarin, Aliskiren), but **none of the prescribed medications are statins or fibrates**, which would serve as explicit evidence of ongoing lipid management or a pre-existing lipid disorder being actively treated.
